author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for centralized SessionState (Arc<RwLock<>>) with ~98 categorized fields and tokio::sync::broadcast on_session_switch listeners, plus migration of fields off App into SessionState. Not addressable in a cleanup pass: foundational state refactor that intersects #253 (App decomposition) — both must be designed together. Phase 1 spec materials referenced in /home/doll/claude-code-design-documents/.design/state-management.md (external). Owner-level multi-day architectural work.
